Category CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's primary medical condition category that best describes the primary reason for admission. effective 10/01/2018
749 J2000_PRIOR_SRGRY_IND J2000_PRIOR_SRGRY_IND J2000 Prior Surgry Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates whether the resident had major surgery during the 100 days prior to admission. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
8 = Unknown effective 10/01/2018
750 N2001_DRUG_RGMN_RVW_IND N2001_DRUG_RGMN_RVW_IND N2001 Drug Regimen Review Indicator CHAR 1 Indicates a complete drug
